overall.description: First-person perspective from a passenger aboard the NCART train in Cyberpunk 2077, traveling through a foggy Night City at night. The journey transitions from the interior cabin to exterior views of towering skyscrapers, arrives at an illuminated station platform, and continues through dense urban canyons with neon signage.

events.description: camera shifts focus from interior passengers to exterior city view through window

agents.ego_description: seated inside the moving NCART train, observing the foggy cityscape through the window

notable_agents.action: passenger wearing pink cap and colorful shirt sitting by the window

entered.detail: rows of brown leather seats inside the train cabin
large rectangular window showing the night city outside
diffused red and white lights from distant buildings visible through fog

segments.scene_description: Inside the NCART train cabin, a passenger in a pink cap sits by the window as the train moves through Night City. The interior is dimly lit with artificial lighting, and the foggy cityscape is visible through the window.

scene_state.functional_zone: elevated train tracks above urban sprawl

events.description: view shifts from interior cabin to exterior panoramic city view
train passes close to a massive dark skyscraper with illuminated windows

agents.ego_description: traveling on the elevated train, viewing the foggy cyberpunk cityscape with towering buildings

entered.detail: tall dark buildings with grid patterns of illuminated windows rising through fog
tall structure with red warning lights blinking in the distance
distant flying cars visible in the foggy sky

segments.scene_description: The train travels on elevated tracks through the foggy Night City, passing massive skyscrapers with illuminated windows. The view is expansive, showing the dense urban sprawl with red aviation towers and distant flying vehicles visible in the hazy night sky.

events.description: train begins slowing down as it approaches the station platform
train arrives at NCART station, platform and waiting area become visible

agents.ego_description: seated on the train as it arrives and stops at the NCART station platform

notable_agents.action: pedestrian walking along the platform near the station entrance

entered.detail: concrete platform with yellow safety lines and waiting benches
large illuminated cyan sign reading 'NCART' above the station entrance
rows of orange benches on the platform

segments.scene_description: The train slows and arrives at an NCART station platform, where a few pedestrians are visible walking or waiting. The station features bright cyan neon signage and orange benches, providing a sheltered stop before the journey continues.

scene_state.functional_zone: dense urban canyon between high-rise buildings

events.description: train accelerates departing the station, entering a narrow urban canyon
passing close to buildings with large illuminated billboards and advertisements

agents.ego_description: departing the station and traveling through a dense urban canyon with close-proximity skyscrapers

entered.detail: tall buildings passing by very close to the train tracks with illuminated apartment windows
large illuminated billboard with a face advertisement on the building facade
narrow corridor between massive high-rise buildings creating an urban canyon effect

segments.scene_description: Departing the station, the train enters a dense urban canyon where skyscrapers pass by in close proximity. Large illuminated billboards and apartment windows light up the narrow corridor as the train continues through the heart of Night City.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous first-person perspective that transitions from the dim interior of a commuter train into the expansive, neon-lit urban canyons of Night City. It begins inside the NCART cabin beside a passenger in a pink cap, looking out through the glass at a foggy cityscape. As the camera moves toward the exterior, the view opens up to elevated tracks passing massive skyscrapers and red aviation towers amidst a hazy night sky filled with distant flying vehicles. The scene then shifts as the train slows to a halt at a station platform characterized by bright cyan neon signage and orange benches, before accelerating once more. Finally, the environment tightens into a dense urban corridor where towering apartment buildings and glowing billboards pass in close proximity, enveloping the camera in the heart of the city.
